API REFERENCE¶

The API reference provides detailed descriptions of YAFS’s classes and functions. It should be helpful if you plan to extend YAFS with custom components.

  • yafs
  • yafs.core — Simulator engine
  • yafs.topology
  • yafs.application
  • yafs.population
  • yafs.placement
  • yafs.selection
  • yafs.distribution
  • yafs.stats
  • yafs.metrics
  • yafs.services
